goals: Audit queue consistency across API, services, client, tests, and docs.
Prefer findings and bounded drift fixes over algorithm rewrites.
Require human review for any real queue behavior change.
must_run: cd frontend && npm run test:run -- src/api/__tests__/queue.test.js
If a browser queue flow changed, run: cd frontend && npx playwright test frontend/e2e/queue-system.spec.js
must_not_touch: queue numbering or timing algorithms without explicit approval
required_artifacts: explicit note of any deferred protected fix
stop_conditions: The task turns into a queue behavior rewrite.
A migration or secret change becomes necessary.
The approved file or diff budget would be exceeded.
review_notes: Human review is mandatory because queue behavior is a protected zone.
Use a separate contract for any non-trivial queue behavior change.
